changelog: Phase 8 visual unification: header collapses secondary nav into 'Ещё ▾' dropdown (single-row desktop, mobile-untouched); 13 page-specific stylesheets migrated to design tokens (KDS dark theme, all admin surfaces flow tenant brand); inline style='width' replaced with data-w attributes (CSP cleanup); Playwright visual regression suite. Hot-fixes in 1.4.2: (1) header-more.js binds click directly to the toggle button — other globals stop event bubbling so the document-level handler never fired; (2) script tag drops the empty nonce attribute when scriptNonce is unset; (3) one straggler inline style on owner.php (analytics heatmap days input) migrated to data-w='sm'.
